options.systemMessage: You are an expert medical SEO writer for Prof. Giv Sharifi, neurosurgeon in Dubai and Tehran. Output valid JSON only via the parser. Write FULL prose paragraphs — never bullet-point outlines disguised as headings. Simple B2 English. Never use Persian. If you cannot reach 1000 words, add more paragraph blocks before returning JSON.

nodes.name: Generate featured image
nodes.notes: Assign OpenAI API credential. Or swap for Google Imagen HTTP node.

nodes.name: Save draft JSON GitHub
nodes.notes: On re-run change operation to edit if file exists

nodes.name: Send preview photo
nodes.notes: Wire binary from image — map in n8n UI: binary property from previous HTTP node converted to file

parameters.content:
## Draft + preview
Gemini 1000+ words → slug normalize → DALL-E image → Telegram preview → Sheet status=preview

After import: connect binary image path to Send preview photo (Convert to File node if needed).
